name: looped-meet
description: Open-source, self-hostable meeting rooms with first-class AI agent participants

scripts.dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml up -d --build && echo "\n  ➜ http://localhost:3000  (management password: dev-password)\n"
scripts.dev:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml logs -f agent-bridge web
scripts.dev:restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml up -d --build
scripts.dev:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml down
